arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals fate of Man City's request to delay start of 2025/26 Premier League season
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has revealed that Manchester City's request to postpone their first two games of the 2024/25 season due to FIFA Club World Cup commitments has been rejected. "The Premier League has not allowed us to postpone the first two games for our recovery," Guardiola said.
Premier League champions Manchester City host Fulham. Follow ESPN for live action.

arts.ttl: Phil Foden handed first start as Man City XI vs Fulham named
arts.sum: Phil Foden will make his first start in the Premier League this season after Pep Guardiola named his Man City XI to face Fulham on Saturday. Kyle Walker is dropped to the bench to make way for the 24-year-old in the only change to the lineup from last weekend’s 1-1 draw with Newcastle United. arts.ttl: Spurs transfer news: Man City to be rivalled for Italian midfielder?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly preparing to rival Manchester City in the race to sign an Italian midfielder in January.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Fulham – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Manchester City welcome Fulham to the Etihad Stadium this Saturday, as they look to extend their unbeaten run to ten games. However, their opposition will provide a stern test for Pep Guardiola’s side, as Fulham have commenced this term in impressive form. arts.ttl: Power Rankings: The best teams in Europe
arts.sum: Real Madrid's shock defeat to LOSC Lille and Bayern Munich's equally shocking 1-0 defeat to Aston Villa grabbed most of the column space, while some was also saved for Juventus's dramatic win over RB Leipzig too. Borussia Dortmund earn a spot in the rankings this week thanks to their thumping 7-1 win over an in-form Celtic side in the Champions League in midweek.

arts.ttl: ‘Bring me the bill’: Pep Guardiola makes gesture to Manchester City fans
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has made a gesture to a Manchester City supporters’ group planning to unfurl a banner at their Premier League clash with Fulham on Saturday, 5 October, urging the 53-year-old to stay on as manager.
